articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona set deadline for Argentina's Álvarez; Spain's Rodri wants Real Madrid
articles.description: Barcelona have set a deadline of July 31 for Atlético Madrid to accept their offer to sign Argentina striker Julián Álvarez. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Man United's Senne Lammens will bounce back well from Belgium World Cup woe - Tom Heaton
articles.description: Senne Lammens will come back from his FIFA World Cup frustration as a better goalkeeper, Manchester United teammate Tom Heaton has said.

articles.headline: Goalkeeper Radek Vitek ready to leave Man United in search of No. 1 role
articles.description: Goalkeeper Radek Vitek is ready to leave Manchester United in search of regular first-team football.

articles.headline: Premier League preseason friendlies 2026-27: Fixtures, UK kick-off times and summer tour schedule
articles.description: Premier League clubs have confirmed their preseason schedules ahead of the new campaign, with the 2026-27 season kicking off on Aug. 21.

articles.headline: Premier League 2026 summer transfers: All confirmed ins, outs for every club
articles.description: Here's every Premier League in and out before the 2026-27 season begins.

articles.headline: Premier League, EFL summer transfer window 2026 dates: When is Deadline Day?
articles.description: Everything that Premier League and EFL supporters need to know about the 2026 summer transfer window, and key dates around it.
